'''âdh-dh-g''' ('''kadhadhag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fidget|fidget]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fidget|fidget]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-dh-g
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadhag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhadhag|thidhadhag]] || [[word:jidhadhag|jidhadhag]] || [[word:shidhadhag|shidhadhag]] || [[word:kidhadhag|kidhadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhadhag|thuthudhadhag]] || [[word:jujudhadhag|jujudhadhag]] || [[word:shushudhadhag|shushudhadhag]] || [[word:kukudhadhag|kukudhadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhadhag|thudhadhag]] || [[word:judhadhag|judhadhag]] || [[word:shudhadhag|shudhadhag]] || [[word:kudhadhag|kudhadhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhadhag|thudhadhag]] || [[word:judhadhag|judhadhag]] || [[word:shudhadhag|shudhadhag]] || [[word:kudhadhag|kudhadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhadhag|thedhadhag]] || [[word:jedhadhag|jedhadhag]] || [[word:shedhadhag|shedhadhag]] || [[word:kedhadhag|kedhadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhadhag|thothodhadhag]] || [[word:jojodhadhag|jojodhadhag]] || [[word:shoshodhadhag|shoshodhadhag]] || [[word:kokodhadhag|kokodhadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhadhag|thodhadhag]] || [[word:jodhadhag|jodhadhag]] || [[word:shodhadhag|shodhadhag]] || [[word:kodhadhag|kodhadhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhadhag|thodhadhag]] || [[word:jodhadhag|jodhadhag]] || [[word:shodhadhag|shodhadhag]] || [[word:kodhadhag|kodhadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhadhag|thĂŠdhadhag]] || [[word:jĂŠdhadhag|jĂŠdhadhag]] || [[word:shĂŠdhadhag|shĂŠdhadhag]] || [[word:kĂŠdhadhag|kĂŠdhadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhadhag|thathadhadhag]] || [[word:jajadhadhag|jajadhadhag]] || [[word:shashadhadhag|shashadhadhag]] || [[word:kakadhadhag|kakadhadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhadhag|thadhadhag]] || [[word:jadhadhag|jadhadhag]] || [[word:shadhadhag|shadhadhag]] || [[word:kadhadhag|kadhadhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhadhag|thadhadhag]] || [[word:jadhadhag|jadhadhag]] || [[word:shadhadhag|shadhadhag]] || [[word:kadhadhag|kadhadhag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhadhag|shadhadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhadhag|goshadhadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhadhag|gokishadhadhag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhadhagnĂŒ|shadhadhagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnknĂŒ|goshadhadhagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagnĂŒ|gokishadhadhagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhadhagshĂ«|shadhadhagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkshĂ«|goshadhadhagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagshĂ«|gokishadhadhagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadhagro|shadhadhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkro|goshadhadhagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagro|gokishadhadhagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhagmu|shadhadhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkmu|goshadhadhagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagmu|gokishadhadhagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhadhagsher|shadhadhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnksher|goshadhadhagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagsher|gokishadhadhagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhadhagng|shadhadhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkng|goshadhadhagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagng|gokishadhadhagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhadhagya|shadhadhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkya|goshadhadhagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagya|gokishadhadhagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhadhagyam|shadhadhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkyam|goshadhadhagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagyam|gokishadhadhagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadhagnĂŒshĂ«|shadhadhagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhadhagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhadhagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadhagnĂŒro|shadhadhagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnknĂŒro|goshadhadhagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagnĂŒro|gokishadhadhagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhagnĂŒmu|shadhadhagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnknĂŒmu|goshadhadhagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagnĂŒmu|gokishadhadhagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadhagshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhadhagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhadhagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhadhagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadhagshĂ«ro|shadhadhagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkshĂ«ro|goshadhadhagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagshĂ«ro|gokishadhadhagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhagshĂ«mu|shadhadhagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkshĂ«mu|goshadhadhagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagshĂ«mu|gokishadhadhagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadhagronĂŒ|shadhadhagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkronĂŒ|goshadhadhagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagronĂŒ|gokishadhadhagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadhagroshĂ«|shadhadhagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkroshĂ«|goshadhadhagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagroshĂ«|gokishadhadhagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhagromu|shadhadhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkromu|goshadhadhagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagromu|gokishadhadhagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhadhagmunĂŒ|shadhadhagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkmunĂŒ|goshadhadhagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagmunĂŒ|gokishadhadhagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhadhagmushĂ«|shadhadhagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkmushĂ«|goshadhadhagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagmushĂ«|gokishadhadhagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhadhagmuro|shadhadhagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhadhagnkmuro|goshadhadhagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhadhagmuro|gokishadhadhagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
